content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom index 37 (N) is covalently bonded to the following neighbor atoms:
- Atom index 28 (Element: C)
- Atom index 38 (Element: O)
- Atom index 39 (Element: O)

The geomconf_index is 7174.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 37 (element: N). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
